subject: ARALING_PANLIPUNAN
title: Provincial Symbols Tell Stories
objective: Suriin ang orihinal na kathang-isip na sagisag at ebidensya sa bawat elemento.
introduction: Ang prototype ay dapat gumamit ng original fictional emblem at hindi kopya ng official seal. You will explore examples, sort cards, practice, and answer five questions.

vocabulary.definition: A key word used in the lesson “Provincial Symbols Tell Stories”.
A key word used in the lesson “Provincial Symbols Tell Stories”.
A key word used in the lesson “Provincial Symbols Tell Stories”.

activities.instruction: Pag-aralan ang ideya at pakinggan ang salaysay.
activities.content: Ang prototype ay dapat gumamit ng original fictional emblem at hindi kopya ng official seal.
activities.accessibilityAlternative: Text alternative: Ang prototype ay dapat gumamit ng original fictional emblem at hindi kopya ng official seal.

activities.instruction: Suriin ang bawat learning token at basahin ang mga halimbawa.
activities.accessibilityAlternative: A numbered list of the same examples is available for keyboard and screen-reader use.

activities.instruction: Ilagay ang bawat card sa “angkop” o “hindi angkop.”

feedback.correct: Your groups follow the lesson rule.
feedback.retry: Use the explanation, not color or position.

activities.accessibilityAlternative: Tap an item and then tap a labeled category; dragging is optional.

activities.instruction: Ano ang ligtas gamitin sa prototype?

feedback.correct: Correct: orihinal na kathang-isip na sagisag
feedback.retry: Read the lesson rule again. eksaktong kopya ng official seal and pekeng government mark do not fit.

activities.accessibilityAlternative: All choices are visible text and selectable with TalkBack.

activities.instruction: Itambal ang bawat halimbawa sa ideya ng aralin.

feedback.retry: Return to the explanation and compare one pair at a time.

activities.accessibilityAlternative: A list-based matching control replaces drag gestures.

activities.instruction: Tapusin nang sunod-sunod ang gabay na balik-aral.

feedback.correct: You are ready for the five-question check.

activities.accessibilityAlternative: Up and down buttons provide an alternative to dragging.

items.prompt: Aling pahayag ang pinakaangkop sa “Provincial Symbols Tell Stories”?

options.text: Ang prototype ay dapat gumamit ng original fictional emblem at hindi kopya ng official seal.

items.explanation: The correct response is “Ang prototype ay dapat gumamit ng original fictional emblem at hindi kopya ng official seal.” because it follows the lesson explanation: Ang prototype ay dapat gumamit ng original fictional emblem at hindi kopya ng official seal.
The correct response is “dahon—kalikasan ayon sa paliwanag” because it follows the lesson explanation: Ang prototype ay dapat gumamit ng original fictional emblem at hindi kopya ng official seal.

items.prompt: Alin ang hindi sumusunod sa ideya ng aralin?
items.explanation: The correct response is “Kopyahin official seal” because it follows the lesson explanation: Ang prototype ay dapat gumamit ng original fictional emblem at hindi kopya ng official seal.

items.prompt: Ano ang ligtas gamitin sa prototype?
items.explanation: The correct response is “orihinal na kathang-isip na sagisag” because it follows the lesson explanation: Ang prototype ay dapat gumamit ng original fictional emblem at hindi kopya ng official seal.

items.prompt: Aling halimbawa ang dapat gamitin sa huling balik-aral?
items.explanation: The correct response is “aklat—pagkatuto” because it follows the lesson explanation: Ang prototype ay dapat gumamit ng original fictional emblem at hindi kopya ng official seal.

assetSpecs.prompt: Friendly Grade 3 cartoon storybook concept board for Provincial Symbols Tell Stories; rounded shapes, warm dark-brown outlines, tropical palette, no embedded text, uncluttered small-screen layout. Compose overlays provide labels and interactive targets.
assetSpecs.contentDescription: Five connected learning tokens for exploring examples in Provincial Symbols Tell Stories.
